query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "physisforcing: physics reinforced world simulator for robotic manipula" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (d) as it provides a canonical systematic review of the domain (embodied AI and foundation models for robotics) and addresses the core mechanism of integrating LLMs with physical interaction, which is the essential context for extending a "Physics Reinforced World Simulator." While it does not specifically mention "PhysisForcing," it establishes the empirical baseline and foundational landscape for the specific sub-field of physics-aware robotic manipulation
